description: Plasma surfaces available in StellCoilBench with physical parameters. Minor radii are computed from simsopt SurfaceRZFourier objects. All thresholds in case files and the proposer policy are specified at ARIES-CS reactor scale (a=1.7 m) and are automatically rescaled to device scale via a0 = 1.7 / minor_radius.

surfaces.notes: Well-studied benchmark surface. Device-scale thresholds are ~10× smaller than reactor-scale. Very small surface — coils need low Fourier orders to avoid overfitting.

surfaces.description: Landreman-Paul 2021 quasi-helically symmetric stellarator at reactor scale (nfp=4, stellsym)
surfaces.notes: Already at reactor scale (a0 ≈ 1.0). Thresholds in case files map nearly 1:1 to device scale. Challenging due to nfp=4 and complex shaping.

surfaces.description: Helically Symmetric eXperiment quasi-helically symmetric configuration (nfp=4, stellsym)
surfaces.notes: Very small surface with high a0. Device-scale thresholds are ~13× smaller. Complex 3D shaping with nfp=4 makes coil design challenging.

surfaces.description: Wendelstein 7-X without coil ripple, beta=0.05, d23p4_tm (nfp=5, stellsym)
surfaces.notes: Medium-scale surface. nfp=5 means 5× coil symmetry. Good testbed for constrained optimization (cc, cs thresholds matter here).

surfaces.description: NCSX c09r00 half-tesla configuration (nfp=3, stellsym, FOCUS format)
surfaces.notes: FOCUS-format surface file. Moderate a0 scaling.

surfaces.description: Circular tokamak surface (nfp=1, axisymmetric, full torus)
surfaces.notes: Simplest geometry. Already near reactor scale (a0 < 1). Uses full torus range. Good for sanity checks.

surfaces.description: Schuett-Henneberg QA design (nfp=2, VMEC wout format)
surfaces.notes: Large reactor-scale surface (a0 < 1). VMEC wout format — virtual casing option available.
Extremely small tabletop stellarator. Highest a0 of all surfaces — device-scale thresholds are ~40× smaller than reactor-scale defaults. May need adjusted thresholds.
Small Chinese stellarator design. Moderate a0 scaling.

surfaces.description: Rotating ellipse surface (simple analytic geometry, nfp=2, stellsym)
surfaces.notes: Simple analytic surface, near reactor scale. Good for testing.
